title: Improvement Signal
description: Canonical schema for ranked improvement signals fed to research-cycle gap-analyze. Sources: propose-work.py aggregates supervision-kpi, fix-verify, calibration-canary, patterns.jsonl, improvement-log, supervision-audit, session-retro.

source.description: Which measurement system produced this signal

confidence.description: How certain is the signal. 1.0 = deterministic measurement, 0.5 = pattern inference

recency_days.description: Days since the signal was last observed

steering_impact.description: True if this signal directly measures human steering load (MANUAL_COORDINATION, corrections, rubber stamps). False for quality/reliability signals.

category.description: Signal category for grouping: steering, reliability, quality, freshness, drift

description.description: Human-readable description of what needs attention

evidence_ref.description: Pointer to source data: file:line, patterns.jsonl:name, improvement-log:date

recurrence.description: Number of times this signal has been observed
